name: Thrill Ride of a Tuna Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 tablespoons Tequila, or Fresh orange juice
recipeInstructions:
MARINADE: Combine cilantro, lime, tequila (or fresh orange juice), jalapeno pepper (without seeds), garlic, salt, and crushed red pepper flakes in a small bowl. Whisk until blended. Gradually whisk in the olive oil. Set aside 1/2 cup for later use.
1. Place tuna steaks in a glass baking dish and top with remaining marinade. Turn to coat well.
2. Refrigerate up to 2 hours.
3. Grill or broil tuna until just opaque in the center, about 4 minutes per side.
4. Serve over an assortment of lettuce (romaine, red leaf lettuce, red and/or green cabbage, spinach, etc.). Toss with the reserved 1/2 cup marinade and chill.
6 Servings BLACK BEAN RELISH
